message:
Fix bugs in rotation and activate code

1. Fix vault nil check order in activate.go - was calling vault.ActiveProfile()
   before checking if vault was nil, which would cause a panic
2. Fix deprecated strings.Title usage in rotation.go - replaced with explicit
   case handling for plan types (pro, team, enterprise)
3. Fix capture variable scoping bug in codex.go - capture was declared inside
   an if block but referenced outside it

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
